data.title: Eric Trump says he wouldn’t want to be the last country that negotiates a trade deal with his Dad
data.description:
Eric Trump went on X on Thursday and told the world exactly how things are going to go under his father’s new trade policy. “I wouldn’t want to be the last country that tries to negotiate a trade deal with @realDonaldTrump. The first to negotiate will win—the last will absolutely lose. I have seen this […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eric-trump-last-country-negotiate-trade-deal/

data.title: ParaSwap Rebrands to Velora and Launches Delta v2.5 Upgrade
data.description:
TL;DR ParaSwap rebrands to Velora and launches Delta v. 2. 5, incorporating an intent-based trading system for greater flexibility. The update allows order customization, protects against MEV bots, and improves transaction execution across different blockchains
source: https://crypto-economy.com/paraswap-rebrands-to-velora-and-launches-delta-v2-5-upgrade/

data.title: First Digital defends FDUSD from Justin Sun’s attacks
data.description:
First Digital Trust has defended its firm after Justin Sun claimed it had misappropriated the vast majority of TrueUSD reserves.
source: https://protos.com/first-digital-defends-fdusd-from-justin-suns-attacks/

data.title: Republic agrees to acquire crypto trading company INX for up to $60 million
data.description:
Republic will fold INX into its operations to bolster its blockchain investment services.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349497/republic-agrees-to-acquire-crypto-trading-company-inx-for-up-to-60-million?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Paul Atkins’ SEC nomination clears hurdle amid crypto-friendly shift and heated debate
data.description:
4-4-2025 – The U. S. Senate Banking Committee has propelled Paul Atkins, President Donald Trump’s pick to helm the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), one step closer to the top job. On a crisp Thursday morning, the committee’s 13-11 vote—split starkly along party lines with every Democrat dissenting—underscored the contentious stakes of Atkins’ ascent
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/paul-atkins-sec-nomination-clears-hurdle-amid-crypto-friendly-shift-and-heated-debate/

data.title: Why Bitcoin’s $65k-$71k zone matters: Insights for long-term investors
data.description:
Bitcoin's $65,000-$71,000 support zone is crucial for stabilizing prices, with long-term investors likely accumulating.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/why-bitcoins-65k-71k-zone-matters-insights-for-long-term-investors/

data.title: XRP Battle Between Bulls And Bears Hinges On $1.97 – What To Expect
data.description:
The crypto market watches with bated breath as XRP teeters at $1. 97, a battleground where bullish conviction clashes with bearish determination. After a retreat from recent highs, the digital asset now faces a critical test. The current standoff mirrors the broader tug-of-war in crypto markets, where sentiment shifts rapidly and key price levels dictate the next major move
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-rally-hinges-on-1-97/

data.title: Dogecoin Whales Accumulate 220M: DOGE Price Targets $0.6533
data.description:
Large investors have been actively buying Dogecoin (DOGE) as it remains in a critical price range. Whale accumulation has increased in March, with over 220 million DOGE acquired. Analysts believe this trend could push Dogecoin toward higher price levels, with some predicting a long-term target of $0. 6533
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/03/dogecoin-whales-accumulate-220m-doge-price-targets-0-6533/

data.title: Ethereum overcomes setbacks, confirms Pectra upgrade for May 7
data.description:
Ethereum core developers have confirmed that the highly anticipated Pectra upgrade will be deployed on May 7. Nixo Rokish, a member of the Ethereum Foundation’s protocol support team, shared the news in an April 3 post on social media, saying: “Pectra mainnet date confirmed May 7. Let’s gooooo
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ethereum-overcomes-setbacks-confirms-pectra-upgrade-for-may-7/

data.title: FBI Recovers $8,000,000+ of Investor Funds Stolen by CEO of Collapsed Heartland Tri-State Bank in Crypto Scheme
data.description:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has recovered more than $8 million worth of digital assets to repay shareholders of a bank that failed after its chief executive funneled millions of dollars of depositor money into a crypto scheme.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/03/fbi-recovers-8000000-of-investor-funds-stolen-by-ceo-of-collapsed-heartland-tri-state-bank-in-crypto-scheme/
